chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1278 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc.No.5315/2021 2. For hearing of main case 20.02.2025 Mr. Arshad Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, advocate for respondent Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent Mr. Farmanullah, advocate for respondent Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Petitioner’s learned counsel files copy of Office Memorandum 33 of 2021 dated 08.04.2021 and states that in view of the foregoing contention of the petitioner has been granted. Learned counsel for respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that status of the petitioner shall be treated as per the aforesaid Office Memorandum. Learned counsel jointly state that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
